title: Peppery Gooey Dutch Potato Starch Bake
description: An energizing dutch dish featuring potato starch with a peppery twist for a keto-friendly option.

ingredients.name: 1 cup finely grated Dutch potato starch
ingredients.notes: ensure it's the starchy variety, not flour

ingredients.name: 1/2 teaspoon cayenne pepper
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste for heat level

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup finely chopped fresh herbs (like parsley or cilantro)
2 eggs, beaten
ingredients.notes: binds ingredients together for a gooey texture

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease a baking dish with coconut oil.
Combine potato starch, cayenne pepper, and black pepper in a mixing bowl. Add the beaten eggs and chopped herbs. Mix well until fully incorporated.
Pour the mixture into the greased baking dish. Smooth out to create an even layer. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Remove from oven and let it cool slightly before serving. Serve warm with a side of guacamole or salsa as desired.
